metadata.description: My personal plugins for code development and standardization that provides reusable components, agents, and tools to maintain consistency across projects

plugins.name: cstack-core
plugins.description: Essential development bundle with onboarding commands, GitHub issue analysis and fixes, audio notification hooks on Claude Code events, and integrated MCP servers

plugins.name: aodk
plugins.description: AI-powered ontology development with a 7-step workflow, OWL-MCP editing, ODK/ROBOT tools, 55+ ontology design patterns, and competency question verification

plugins.name: cstack-collab
plugins.description: Multi-agent collaboration patterns for Claude Code: orchestrators that fan out across dependent GitHub issues, with one PR per sub-ticket and human-in-the-loop merge gates

plugins.name: cstack-guardrails
plugins.description: Always-on git/gh hygiene guards: deny --no-verify, deny git push --force to the default branch, and deny git commit while on the default branch. Set CSTACK_GUARDRAILS_OVERRIDE=1 to bypass for a single command.
